# Ztract
> Extract mainframe EBCDIC binary files using real
> COBOL copybooks. Zero MIPS. pip install ztract.

Ztract is a Python 3.10+ CLI tool that decodes
IBM mainframe EBCDIC binary files into CSV, JSON
Lines, Parquet, or database tables using COBOL
copybooks as the schema. The Java engine (Cobrix
cobol-parser) handles all binary decoding. Python
handles connectivity, orchestration, and output.

## CLI Commands

ztract convert  --copybook FILE.cpy --input DATA.DAT
                --recfm FB --lrecl 500 --codepage cp277
                --output out.csv

ztract diff     --copybook FILE.cpy --before A.DAT
                --after B.DAT --key FIELD-NAME

ztract generate --copybook FILE.cpy --records 10000
                --codepage cp277 --seed 42
                --output MOCK.DAT

ztract inspect  --copybook FILE.cpy
ztract validate --copybook FILE.cpy --input DATA.DAT
ztract run      job.yaml
ztract init
ztract status

## Record Formats
F, FB, V, VB, FBA, VBA

## EBCDIC Code Pages
cp277 (Norway/Denmark — primary), cp037 (USA default),
cp273 (Germany), cp875 (Greece), cp870 (Eastern Europe),
cp1047 (Latin-1), cp838 (Thailand), cp1025 (Cyrillic)
Aliases: --codepage norway = cp277

## Connectivity (input and output)
local:  --input ./FILE.DAT
ftp:    --input ftp://user:pass@host/DATASET
sftp:   --input sftp://user@host/DATASET
zowe:   --zowe-profile PROD --dataset HLQ.DATASET
        Backends: zosmf (default), zftp (no z/OSMF needed)
        Transfer modes: binary, text, encoding, record

## YAML Pipeline Format
version: "1.0"
job:
  name: my-extract
connections:
  prod: &prod
    type: ftp
    host: mf01.bank.com
    user: ${FTP_USER}
    password: ${FTP_PASS}
    transfer_mode: binary
steps:
  - name: extract
    action: convert
    input:
      connection: *prod
      dataset: HLQ.CUST.MASTER
      record_format: FB
      lrecl: 500
      codepage: cp277
    copybook: ./CUSTMAST.cpy
    output:
      - type: csv
        path: ./output/customers.csv
      - type: parquet
        path: ./output/customers.parquet

## Output Targets
csv, jsonl, parquet,
postgresql://, mysql://, mssql://,
ftp://, sftp://,
s3://, az://, gs:// (cloud via fsspec)

## Java Engine
Requires JRE 11+ on PATH. JAR bundled in package.
java -version to verify.

## Installation
pip install ztract
pip install ztract[postgres]   # PostgreSQL
pip install ztract[mysql]      # MySQL
pip install ztract[mssql]      # SQL Server
pip install ztract[aws]        # S3 output
pip install ztract[azure]      # Azure Blob output
pip install ztract[gcp]        # Google Cloud output
pip install ztract[cloud]      # All three cloud providers

## Attribution
Built on Cobrix by AbsaOSS (Apache 2.0).
Zowe CLI by Open Mainframe Project (EPL 2.0).
Cloud storage via fsspec ecosystem (BSD-3).
https://github.com/AbsaOSS/cobrix

https://github.com/SRRC-1334/ztract
